_**User**_

The local dev server is running at http://localhost:3000. Please capture full-page screenshots of the following four pages and report back what you observe (fonts rendering, layout intact, any obvious visual bugs). Do NOT interact beyond navigating and screenshotting.

1. http://localhost:3000/ (home — verify the new local serif/sans fonts render)
2. http://localhost:3000/about/mission-vision (verify the four animated pillar boxes appear in a row; hover the first pillar box and screenshot the revealed description)
3. http://localhost:3000/solutions/livebalanced-studio (verify DARK cinematic background with cream text, and a dark footer at the bottom)
4. http://localhost:3000/resources/employees (verify article cards render 3 per row)

Also, on the home page, hover the "About" item in the top navigation and screenshot to confirm the dropdown menu appears with Our Story / Mission & Vision / Community Impact.

Return a concise summary of findings and flag anything that looks broken.

---

_**Agent (claude-4.5-sonnet)**_

I've successfully captured full-page screenshots of all four pages and verified the requested visual elements. Here's what I found:

## ✅ Home Page (http://localhost:3000/)
- **Fonts:** Local serif and sans-serif fonts are rendering properly throughout
- **Layout:** Clean hero section with large gold serif headline and white body text
- **Navigation:** Confirmed the "About" dropdown menu appears with all three items: Our Story, Mission & Vision, and Community Impact

## ✅ Mission & Vision Page (http://localhost:3000/about/mission-vision)
- **Four pillar boxes:** Display correctly in a single horizontal row (Physical, Mental, Financial, Social Wellness)
- **Hover interaction:** Works as expected - the Physical Wellness box reveals description text and a "Learn more" link when hovered/clicked
- ⚠️ **Issue:** React hydration error detected in dev console (doesn't break the visual display)

## ✅ LiveBalanced Studio Page (http://localhost:3000/solutions/livebalanced-studio)
- **Dark background:** Cinematic dark navy/black background renders throughout
- **Cream text:** White/cream text displays with excellent contrast
- **Dark footer:** Present at bottom with social icons and copyright

## ✅ Resources/Employees Page (http://localhost:3000/resources/employees)
- **Article cards:** Render in perfect 3-column grid layout
- **Layout:** Two rows of three cards each (6 articles total)
- **Styling:** Consistent card design with proper spacing

**Overall assessment:** All pages render correctly with proper fonts, intact layouts, and no obvious visual bugs. The only issue is the hydration error on Mission & Vision, which should be addressed but doesn't affect the visual presentation.
